data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of syncing back to the main booking system. However, the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations that demonstrate this sync occurs. The absence of relevant evidence indicates a clear gap in fulfilling the requirement, as the step explicitly states the need for this functionality to be validated.
gaps: No evidence of syncing back to the main booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
